prompt: A soft, cozy anime portrait of a catgirl VTuber inspired by 猫又おかゆ, shown from the waist up in a warm café-like room. She has short, fluffy, slightly tousled pastel lavender hair with layered bangs partially covering one eye, large matching cat ears with soft inner fur, and violet eyes with a sleepy, affectionate half-lidded expression and a faint blush. Add 2 hair accessories on the right side of her bangs: 1 paw-shaped clip and 1 simple barrette. She leans her head into one hand with a relaxed, teasing smile, facing the viewer in a gentle close-up composition. She wears an oversized light lavender hoodie with long loose sleeves, 2 fluffy pom-pom drawstrings, and a small cat-face emblem on the chest. Place her seated at a wooden table with 1 purple mug decorated with a cat face in the lower left foreground and 1 sleeping white-and-gray cat curled on a lavender cushion in the lower right foreground. The background is a softly lit pastel interior with 2 warm hanging lamps, 1 potted plant on a shelf, 1 framed cat picture on the wall, pink cushions, wooden shelves, and a calm homey atmosphere. Use high-detail clean anime linework, glossy eyes, soft shading, subtle rim light, warm ambient lighting, pastel color palette, and a polished cute VTuber illustration style.
